title: Funky Crumbly Spanish All Purpose Flour Croquetas
description: A midnight-craving Spanish dish made with all purpose flour, served as crispy croquetas.

ingredients.name: Beurre monte
ingredients.notes: Use room temperature butter for best results.

ingredients.name: Chopped onion
ingredients.notes: For added flavor, use sweet onions like Vidalia.

ingredients.name: Minced garlic
ingredients.notes: For a stronger garlic flavor, use roasted garlic.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality, flaky sea salt for best results.

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for best flavor.

instructions: Whisk together flour and bechamel in a large bowl until well combined.
Add beurre monte, onion, garlic, salt, and pepper; mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oil or grease in a deep frying pan over medium heat to 37538F.
Using a small cookie scoop or spoon, drop the dough into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
Fry the croquetas in batches of 5-6 until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the croquetas on paper towels and serve hot with chopped parsley or chives, if desired.
